---
title: "🟢 Causal Inference"
subtitle: "Identification strategies, potential outcomes, and the methods behind defensible decisions."
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: causal-posts
    contents:
      - "../posts/**/*.qmd"
    include:
      categories: ["causal-inference","causal inference" ]
    sort: "date asc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
    max-items: 30
---

Every business decision is a causal question in disguise. *Did this
work? Was it worth the money? What would have happened without it?*
The methods on this page are the ones I reach for when the answer
matters and the data is not a randomized trial.

This is the foundation arc of the blog. The other two — pricing and
forecasting — build on the vocabulary and habits established here.

---

## Posts in this series

::: {#causal-posts}
:::

---
